title: CobbleKanto - A Cobblemon Adventure
description: A Cobblemon adventure based on 3rd Gen Nostalgic Games!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/oYbkEnG2Fp8" title="CobbleKanto video showcase" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# CobbleKanto

**CobbleKanto** is a Minecraft adventure modpack built around a full nostalgic journey, redesigned for Cobblemon, multiplayer exploration, custom NPCs, puzzle routes, handcrafted towns, and a complete progression experience.

This is not just a regular Cobblemon modpack. CobbleKanto is a full adventure world made to be explored, challenged, and experienced with friends! With custom systems, blocks, models, NPC stories, special routes, gyms, interiors, caves, rewards, and mechanics created specifically for this project.

[![CobbleKanto Shockbyte sponsor banner showing the CobbleKanto logo and Shockbyte partner text](https://i.imgur.com/M2eXvx1.png)](https://shockbyte.com/partner/COBBLEKANTO)

**Get 25% off your Minecraft server with Shockbyte!** Ready to start an epic adventure with your friends? Just click [here](https://shockbyte.com/partner/COBBLEKANTO) or on the banner and use promo code **COBBLEKANTO**, plus you’ll be helping us keep improving the modpack and developing future projects!

***

## Start Your Journey

Travel through a handcrafted region inspired by the classic Kanto adventure, now rebuilt inside Minecraft with Cobblemon progression, custom exploration, multiplayer friendly routes, and a world designed to feel alive from the first town to the final challenge.

***

## What Makes CobbleKanto Special?

CobbleKanto includes a full set of custom systems made specifically for this adventure.

**KantoNPCs** brings the world to life with trainers, rivals, shops, tutors, rewards, story characters, hints, choices, and interactive moments across the map.

**SceneBlocks** adds classic adventure-style interactions such as Cut, Rock Smash, Strength puzzles, Flash areas, fog zones, gates, receivers, and route obstacles that make exploration feel closer to a real journey.

**KantoBlocks** and **KantoModels** help shape the visual identity of the world, adding hundreds of custom blocks, decorations, signs, structures, and environmental details made to make towns, routes, gyms, caves, and interiors feel unique.

Together, these systems turn CobbleKanto into more than a modpack — they create a complete playable world.

***

## Features

*   Cobblemon based progression designed around exploration, battles and discovery
*   Custom trainers, rivals, NPCs, shops, rewards, hints and story moments
*   Adventure mechanics inspired by classic "key move" progression
*   Cut, Rock Smash, Strength, Flash, fog areas, gates, puzzles, and hidden paths
*   Hundreds of custom blocks and models created for the CobbleKanto world
*   Custom interiors, parkour sections, secret areas, exclusive rewards
*   A structured adventure experience made for solo players, friend groups, servers, and content creators

***

## Built for Multiplayer Adventure

CobbleKanto was designed with multiplayer in mind, but it is fully playable in singleplayer as well!

The world gives players reasons to explore together, race through routes, challenge trainers, discover secrets, help each other solve puzzles, and create memorable moments across the map.

Whether you are playing casually with friends or building a full server experience, CobbleKanto is made to feel like a shared adventure!

***

CobbleKanto is an unofficial fan-made Minecraft modpack.  

This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by Nintendo, Game Freak, Creatures Inc., The Pokémon Company, Mojang Studios, Microsoft, or the Cobblemon team.
